form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 10 at Wingatui on March 15 over 1500m, slow going 0.5 len behind Inflamed with 53kg at $5.10. The race before that held ground to the line 3rd of 11 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Trader carrying 57kg at $7.50. Has ability and is expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Most recently won by a 0.3 len at this track March 8 over 1400m on a heavy track defeating Monte Khan with 55.5kg at $8.80. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.
